emails.subject: Analyst/Associate Promotion
emails.body: Analyst/Associate Promotion Scott, Your name was given to me as the Representative for Alok Garg, he is being promoted from an Associate to a Manager, per Boris Brevnov. If you need further information please call me at 5-8162. Thank you Elisa Tamez

emails.subject: Re: Analyst/Associate Promotion
emails.body: Re: Analyst/Associate Promotion I am Alok's representative for the global Associate PRC meeting on July 19. I need some feed back on his performance/ranking for the first half of the year.
